rules.description: Detects tokens split across adjacent cells (half-word in each cell).
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: PDF column boundaries inserted inside a text run split a word into two cells.

rules.description: Flags rows whose column count differs from the modal count of the table.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Merged/split cells produce rows with too few or too many columns.

rules.description: Detects cells with multiple distinct values concatenated (e.g. 'Waived Waived').
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Failed column-boundary detection collapses tier values into one cell.

rules.description: Detects noise characters substituting for ✓/✗ (commas, bullets, raw HTML).
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: OCR mis-reads graphical tick marks as nearby ASCII noise.

rules.description: Detects trailing underscore, dash, or stray punctuation after a valid value.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Typographic rules or table borders bleed into adjacent cell text.

rules.description: Two consecutive rows whose first cells appear to be one logical label split in two.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Row-level extraction inserts spurious line breaks inside wrapped cells.

rules.description: Flags cells with garbled, implausible text absent from the source (e.g. 'lakada ada').
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: OCR artefacts from non-text PDF regions inject random characters.

rules.description: Detects footnote blocks that are reordered, missing their numeric marker, or truncated.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Converters often mishandle footnote numbering and ordering.

rules.description: In a numeric-dominant column, flags unexpectedly empty cells.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Column-shift or extraction failures leave numeric cells blank.

rules.description: Detects when the first table row is a prose sentence rather than a column header.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Imprecise bounding-box detection absorbs captions as table rows.

rules.description: Flags tables with more columns than expected (many empty header cells).
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: PDF extraction mistakes whitespace/alignment guides for column separators.

rules.description: Detects cells/footnotes ending abruptly on a common word (preposition, conjunction).
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Page-boundary or buffer issues silently truncate content.

rules.description: A cell holds a wrong value: wrong currency amount, wrong word, or inverted flag.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: OCR digit confusion, column shift, or footnote marker merging produces wrong values.

rules.description: Entire rows are absent from the markdown table compared to the PDF source.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Extractor skips rows when it cannot resolve cell boundaries or page-edge content.

rules.description: An annotation marker (e.g. ±,* → *-*) is corrupted or replaced with wrong character.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Superscript and special marker symbols are frequently mis-read by OCR.

rules.rule_name: Table merge (two tables collapsed into one)
rules.description: Two logically separate PDF tables appear merged into a single markdown table.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: When adjacent tables share a visual boundary the extractor treats them as one.

rules.description: Markdown table has fewer columns than the PDF source (tier columns dropped).
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Column-detection failures cause entire charge-tier columns to vanish.

rules.description: The table ends abruptly; rows present in the PDF are absent from the markdown tail.
rules.why_it_indicates_an_error: Page-break handling or extraction buffer limits cut the table short.
